title: MARA Announces Bitcoin Production and Mining Operation Updates for November 2024
text: MARA announced November 2024 production updates representing a record-breaking month. The company mined 254 blocks, a 27% increase over October and the most blocks in a month on record. BTC production grew 26% month-over-month to 907 BTC and energized hash rate increased to 46.1 EH/s, a 15% increase over October. This remarkable performance demonstrates the company's operational excellence and scaling capabilities.
